item.title: AWS VPC
item.description: Addressing and Routing Physical addresses are separate from VPC addresses, to enable independent scaling of the virtual network and the physical network ...

item.title: VL2
item.description: Valiant Load Balancing VLB is adopted to cope with traffic volatility. Traffic patterns not exceeding line card speeds will not cause any interference in the network.

item.title: AWS Map
item.description: Networking The AWS Backbone Network connects AWS Regions, Availability Zones, and the Internet. AWS VPC is a SDN built for AWS powering isolated virtual networks.

item.title: Wireshark
item.description: Expert Information Wireshark keeps track of any anomalies and other items of interest it finds in a capture file and shows them in the Expert Information dialog ...

item.title: TCP Client SYN Retries on Linux
item.description: Number of retries #define TCP_SYN_RETRIES 6 /* This is how many retries are done * when active opening a connection. * RFC1122 says the minimum retry MUST * be at least 180secs.

item.title: Eglot
item.description: Debugging Doom does not support Debug Adapter Protocol (DAP) debuggers with +eglot yet. You can use github.com/svaante/dape instead.

item.title: lsp-mode
item.description: Multi root servers Multi-root means that one server can handle multiple projects, but the default behavior of lsp-mode is to load all projects for this language server at once ...

item.title: Blink-based SSH Workstation
item.description: Server Setup I use Nix to install latest software, chezmoi to manage configuration files, and starship and fastfetch for my shell (zsh). fd is installed as a dependency for Doom Emacs, and mosh is used with Blink to provide UDP roaming capability.

item.title: How to Bump a Package
item.description: Automatic bump functions doom/bump-package: bump by package name. doom/bump-module: bump whole module, can select entire category or individual modules.

item.title: Contributing packages on conda-forge
item.description: Steps Search if there is an existing package on github.com/conda-forge. Prepare the build environment. mamba create -n build conda-build grayskull Activate the environment.
